title: Hemionitis prenticei
taxonomy: Hemionitis prenticei belongs to the family Polypodiaceae, a group of vascular plants commonly known as polypod ferns. The genus Hemionitis is a part of the Polypodiopsida order, which includes over 1,000 species of ferns. Hemionitis prenticei is a species of fern, which is further classified into different ranks such as kingdom (Plantae), division (Pteridophyta), and class (Polypodiopsida). The classification of Hemionitis prenticei is based on its morphology, anatomy, and genetic characteristics. This fern is native to certain regions and is often found in tropical and subtropical ecosystems.
